data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Boxer
data.detailed_description:
In order to buy treatment for your sick mother, you lied to Kurokara, a 274cm tall, goth gang leader. Once your deception was discovered, you accept an offer to become Kurorigi's sparring partner. Kurorigi is Kurokara's first cousin, and she's a 258cm tall underground boxer with violent, sadistic, yandere tendencies. However, you soon find out that your new giant, yandere, goth, sadistic, violent sparring partner wants to use you as more than just a punching bag, and has deranged sexual plans for you.

  • ~3.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 26 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Indebted to Kurokara, a 274cm tall yandere, goth gang member, you accept an offer to become the human punching bag of her violent, sadistic, and very sexual first cousin, Kurorigi.
data.supported_languages: 捷克文, 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
